recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: IR-SIM is an open-source, lightweight robot simulator based on Python, designed for robotics navigation, control, and learning. This simulator provides a simple and user-friendly framework for simulating robots, sensors, and environments, facilitating the development and testing of robotics algorithms with minimal hardware requirements.
